title: Beast Wars: Transformers
synopsis: Maximals and Predacons crash-land on a mysterious prehistoric planet, adopting beast modes to survive the planet's volatile energon fields. A groundbreaking CGI series that redefined the Transformers franchise with deep character development, shocking twists, and ties to the original Generation One continuity.

episodes.title: Beast Wars (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Two warring factions of Transformers crash-land on an energon-rich planet and adopt beast modes to survive. Dinobot, a disgruntled Predacon, challenges Optimus Primal for leadership of the Maximals.

episodes.title: Beast Wars (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals and Predacons race to claim a massive energon cache on a mountaintop, leading to a fierce battle that cements the conflict as the Beast Wars.

episodes.title: The Web
episodes.synopsis: Cheetor is captured by Tarantulas and taken to the Predacon's web-like lair, where the spider plans to devour him. The Maximals must mount a rescue mission.

episodes.title: Equal Measures
episodes.synopsis: Cheetor and Terrorsaur discover a teleportation link between the two bases. Each tries to use the connection to sabotage the other side.

episodes.title: Chain of Command
episodes.synopsis: When Optimus Primal is lost in an explosion at a mysterious alien site, the Maximals struggle with leadership as Dinobot and Rattrap clash over who should take command.

episodes.title: Power Surge
episodes.synopsis: Terrorsaur discovers a mountain of energon and absorbs its power, becoming supercharged. He overthrows Megatron and attacks the Maximals with devastating force.

episodes.title: Fallen Comrades
episodes.synopsis: A Maximal stasis pod crashes in the arctic, and both factions race to reach the new protoform first. Megatron reprograms the pod, creating the Predacon Tigatron — but the tiger chooses the Maximals.

episodes.title: Double Jeopardy
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia catches Rattrap apparently betraying the Maximals by delivering an energon crystal to Terrorsaur, but Rattrap is actually working as a double agent under Optimus's orders.

episodes.title: A Better Mousetrap
episodes.synopsis: Rhinox installs a new automated defense system in the Maximal base, but it malfunctions and targets the Maximals themselves. Rattrap must navigate the deadly traps to shut it down.

episodes.title: Gorilla Warfare
episodes.synopsis: Scorponok infects Optimus Primal with a cyber-bee virus that turns him into a mindless berserker. The Maximals must find a cure before Primal destroys everything.

episodes.title: The Probe
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals detect a Cybertronian probe passing through the system and desperately attempt to signal it for rescue, but the Predacons try to sabotage their efforts.

episodes.title: Victory
episodes.synopsis: Dinobot discovers Megatron's plan to use a mega-cannon to destroy the Maximal base. He must decide where his true loyalties lie as both sides prepare for a decisive battle.

episodes.title: Dark Designs
episodes.synopsis: Megatron captures Rhinox and uses a Predacon shell program to reprogram him as a Predacon. However, the plan backfires spectacularly when Rhinox proves too competent as a villain.

episodes.title: Double Dinobot
episodes.synopsis: Megatron creates a clone of Dinobot to infiltrate the Maximal base and steal the golden disk. The real Dinobot must fight his doppelganger to expose the deception.

episodes.title: The Spark
episodes.synopsis: A stasis pod activates and the emerging protoform is critically damaged. Rhinox fights to save its spark while the other Maximals defend against a Predacon attack, and the pod ultimately becomes Airazor.

episodes.title: The Trigger (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Tigatron discovers a mysterious floating island with an alien weapon of immense power. Both factions race to claim the island and its devastating capabilities.

episodes.title: The Trigger (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: The battle for the flying island continues as Tigatron must make a choice about the alien weapon. The island is ultimately destroyed to prevent either side from using its power.

episodes.title: Spider's Game
episodes.synopsis: Tarantulas and Blackarachnia scheme independently against both the Maximals and Megatron, revealing hidden agendas within the Predacon ranks.

episodes.title: Call of the Wild
episodes.synopsis: The Maximals begin losing their robot identities to their beast instincts. Tigatron struggles most as his tiger nature threatens to overwhelm his Transformer consciousness.

episodes.title: Dark Voyage
episodes.synopsis: An energon explosion blinds Rhinox, Cheetor, Dinobot, and Rattrap, who must navigate dangerous terrain back to base while guided only by their beast instincts.

episodes.title: Possession
episodes.synopsis: The immortal spark of the original Starscream possesses Waspinator's body and offers an alliance with Megatron, but his treacherous nature soon reveals his true agenda.

episodes.title: The Low Road
episodes.synopsis: Rhinox is infected with a strange virus by Tarantulas. While he suffers bizarre symptoms, Rattrap and Dinobot must work together to infiltrate the Predacon base and find the cure.

episodes.title: Law of the Jungle
episodes.synopsis: Tigatron accidentally causes the destruction of a forest and the death of his tiger companion, leading him to question his role in the Beast Wars and briefly abandon the Maximals.

episodes.title: Before the Storm
episodes.synopsis: An uneasy ceasefire takes hold as Megatron proposes a truce while secretly preparing for the arrival of the alien Vok. Both sides sense that something catastrophic is approaching.

episodes.title: Other Voices (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: The aliens known as the Vok reveal themselves and prepare to sterilize the planet with a massive weapon. Tigatron and Airazor are abducted during the crisis.

episodes.title: Other Voices (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Optimus Primal sacrifices himself to destroy the alien Planet Buster weapon, saving the planet but seemingly perishing in the explosion that also triggers a quantum surge across the planet.

episodes.title: Aftermath
episodes.synopsis: In the wake of the quantum surge, the surviving Transformers discover that some have been mutated into Transmetals. Rhinox works desperately to recover Optimus Primal's spark from the alien probe's wreckage.

episodes.title: Coming of the Fuzors (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Two new Transformers emerge from stasis pods with combined beast modes — Silverbolt, an eagle-wolf Fuzor, and Quickstrike, a scorpion-cobra hybrid. Both factions compete to recruit them.

episodes.title: Coming of the Fuzors (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Silverbolt joins the Maximals while Quickstrike sides with the Predacons. Optimus Primal is successfully revived in a powerful new Transmetal body.

episodes.title: Tangled Web
episodes.synopsis: Tarantulas plots against Megatron by secretly constructing a transmitter, while the Predacons attempt to build a base camp. Blackarachnia and Tarantulas's scheming threatens to unravel the Predacon alliance.

episodes.title: Maximal, No More
episodes.synopsis: Dinobot steals the golden disk from Megatron and appears to defect back to the Predacons. His true motives involve uncovering the disk's secrets about the planet's true nature.

episodes.title: Other Visits (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Another alien site is discovered, and Tarantulas reveals his true agenda — he is not working for the Predacon alliance but for a secret organization with its own plans for the aliens' technology.

episodes.title: Other Visits (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Tigatron and Airazor are captured by the Vok aliens' construct. The battle at the alien site results in the device's destruction, but the two Maximals are lost.

episodes.title: Bad Spark
episodes.synopsis: A stasis pod containing the indestructible and insane Protoform X crashes on the planet. The creature, later named Rampage, proves nearly impossible to stop and is eventually subdued by Optimus.

episodes.title: Code of Hero
episodes.synopsis: Dinobot discovers that Megatron plans to use the golden disk to alter history by destroying the early humans. In a legendary last stand, Dinobot single-handedly defeats the Predacons to protect humanity, sacrificing his life.

episodes.title: Transmutate
episodes.synopsis: A damaged stasis pod produces Transmutate, a deformed but powerful Transformer who can't transform. Both Silverbolt and Rampage connect with the creature, leading to a tragic conflict over its fate.

episodes.title: The Agenda (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: A Predacon secret agent, Ravage, arrives from Cybertron aboard a transwarp cruiser with orders to arrest Megatron. However, Megatron reveals the true significance of the golden disk and persuades Ravage to join him.

episodes.title: The Agenda (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Ravage turns against the Maximals and launches a devastating attack. The Maximals fight back and destroy Ravage's ship, but Megatron escapes with a shocking revelation about the planet's true identity.

episodes.title: The Agenda (Part 3)
episodes.synopsis: Megatron confirms the planet is prehistoric Earth and locates the Ark — the crashed Autobot ship containing the original Optimus Prime. In a shocking cliffhanger, Megatron blasts the sleeping Optimus Prime's head, threatening to unravel all of history.

episodes.title: Optimal Situation
episodes.synopsis: With history collapsing around them due to Megatron's attack on the original Optimus Prime, Primal absorbs Prime's spark into his body, gaining a powerful new Optimal form to repair the timeline.

episodes.title: Deep Metal
episodes.synopsis: Depth Charge, a Maximal obsessed with hunting down Rampage, arrives on the planet via a stasis pod. His single-minded vendetta creates friction with Optimus Primal's leadership.

episodes.title: Changing of the Guard
episodes.synopsis: Rattrap is left in charge of the Maximal base while the others are away. He must single-handedly defend against a Predacon assault on the base's defenses.

episodes.title: Cutting Edge
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia and Silverbolt discover a strange plant that can merge organic and technological matter. Megatron seeks to exploit this proto-human discovery for his own purposes.

episodes.title: Feral Scream (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Cheetor is caught in an explosion at one of Megatron's experiments involving a Transmetal driver. He begins experiencing strange transformations into a feral Transmetal 2 form.

episodes.title: Feral Scream (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: Cheetor's uncontrollable Transmetal 2 transformations intensify. He must learn to master his new feral form before it consumes his personality entirely.

episodes.title: Proving Grounds
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia must prove her loyalty to the Maximals once and for all when Dinobot II and the Predacons attempt to recapture her. She faces a trial by fire against her former faction.

episodes.title: Go with the Flow
episodes.synopsis: Rattrap and Depth Charge are forced to work together when they discover an underwater Predacon base. Their clashing personalities must be set aside to survive.

episodes.title: Crossing the Rubicon
episodes.synopsis: Blackarachnia attempts to use a Transmetal driver to remove her Predacon shell program, risking her life. The procedure nearly kills her before Rhinox manages to stabilize her.

episodes.title: Master Blaster
episodes.synopsis: Quickstrike, manipulated by Megatron, leads a mutiny among the Predacons. Meanwhile, Megatron uses Quickstrike as a diversion while executing his true plan to access the power of the original Decepticon warship Nemesis.

episodes.title: Other Victories
episodes.synopsis: Tigerhawk, a powerful fusion of Tigatron and Airazor controlled by the Vok, arrives on the planet to destroy Megatron. The alien-empowered warrior wreaks havoc on the Predacon base.

episodes.title: Nemesis (Part 1)
episodes.synopsis: Megatron raises the Decepticon warship Nemesis from the ocean floor, giving him overwhelming firepower. The Maximals face their greatest crisis as the ancient warship threatens to destroy them all.

episodes.title: Nemesis (Part 2)
episodes.synopsis: In the final battle of the Beast Wars, the Maximals make a desperate stand against the Nemesis. Megatron is defeated, and the surviving Maximals use the Autobot shuttle to return to Cybertron with their captive, ending the Beast Wars.

facts: Beast Wars was one of the first fully CGI-animated TV series, produced by Mainframe Entertainment (now Rainmaker Studios) in Vancouver, Canada.
The show was originally controversial among G1 fans who objected to the animal alt-modes, but it quickly won them over with its writing quality.
Mainframe Entertainment used Silicon Graphics workstations running Softimage 3D to produce the animation, with each episode taking roughly 6 weeks to render.
The episode 'Code of Hero' is widely regarded as one of the greatest episodes in all of Transformers, featuring Dinobot's heroic sacrifice.
Beast Wars established that the Maximals and Predacons are descendants of the Autobots and Decepticons, directly connecting it to Generation One.
The series won multiple awards and is consistently ranked as one of the best Transformers shows ever produced by both fans and critics.
